session.user: Run the following commands and report results: 1. uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/config.py src/erk/cli/commands/config.py 2. uv run ty check src/erk/cli/config.py src/erk/cli/commands/config.py
session.assistant: I'll run both commands for you and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/config.py src/erk/cli/commands/config.py

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/config.py src/erk/cli/commands/config.py

session.assistant:
Both tools passed successfully:
**ruff check**: All checks passed! - No linting violations in `src/erk/cli/config.py` or `src/erk/cli/commands/config.py`
**ty check**: All checks passed! - No type annotation issues in `src/erk/cli/config.py` or `src/erk/cli/commands/config.py`
